# Vendor / third-party trees

**`mumble/`** — optional local clone of upstream Mumble **desktop** client (C++/Qt) for protocol reference. It is **gitignored** and not pushed; clone into `vendor/mumble` if you want it ([mumble-voip/mumble](https://github.com/mumble-voip/mumble)). **Not** built or deployed as part of the course product.

Your application code lives under **`apps/`**.
